PrimaryVetText.html.source:
This section asks questions about your primary veterinarian's handling of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms.

If you changed primary vets since {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms first appeared, please answer the question about your preferred or most recent primary veterinarian.

PrimaryVetInflammation.title.source: Did your primary veterinarian observe any inflammation, irritation, or infection in the larynx/pharynx area?

PrimaryVetReflux.title.source: Did your primary veterinarian mention reflux (GERD) or esophageal dysfunction as a possible cause of {CmpnName}'s symptoms?

PrimaryVetRefluxMeds.title.source: Did your primary veterinarian prescribe or recommend a reflux medication such as Pepcid (famotidine) or Prilosec (omeprazole) for reflux?

PrimaryVetRefluxInitiative.title.source: Did you start {CmpnName} on reflux medications such as Pepcid (famotidine) or Prilosec (omeprazole) on your own initiative without a prescription or recommendation from your primary vet?

PrimaryVetDidDiscuss.title.source: Did your primary vet discuss LP/GOLPP as a possible cause of {CmpnName}'s symptoms?

PrimaryVetDidDiscuss.choices.NO_MENTION..source: No, did not mention LP/GOLPP at all

PrimaryVetDidDiscuss.choices.POSSIBLY.te.source: Said {CmpnName}'s symptoms were possibly due to LP/GOLPP

PrimaryVetDidDiscuss.choices.DEFINITELY..source: Said {CmpnName}'s symptoms were definitely due to LP/GOLPP

PrimaryVetInfo.title.source: Did your current primary veterinarian give you helpful information about how LP/GOLPP might affect {CmpnName}?

PrimaryVetInfoDetails.title.source: What did they tell you about how LP/GOLPP might affect {CmpnName}?

PrimaryVetSurgery.title.source: Did your primary veterinarian make a recommendation about tieback or other LP/GOLPP surgeries for {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP?

PrimaryVetSurgery.choices.ADVISED_FOR.te.source: Encouraged me to talk to a surgeon

PrimaryVetSurgeryPerception.title.source: Do you feel like your primary veterinarian's recommendation against surgery was due to {CmpnName}'s condition or to a generally negative perception of tieback surgery?

PrimaryVetConfidence.title.source: How confident have you been in your current primary veterinarian's knowledge level regarding LP/GOLPP?

PrimaryVetConfidence.description.source: 1 = not at all confident, 5 = very confident

PrimaryVetSatisfaction.title.source: How satisfied have you been with your current primary veterinarian's handling of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP?

PrimaryVetSatisfaction.description.source: 1 = not at all satisfied, 5 = very satisfied
